'''thawama''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mcgillite|mcgillite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-w-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mcgillite|mcgillite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| thawama
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæwæmæth|thæwæmæth]] || [[word:thæwæmæj|thæwæmæj]] || [[word:thæwæmæsh|thæwæmæsh]] || [[word:thæwæmæ|thæwæmæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thawawamath|thawawamath]] || [[word:thawawamaj|thawawamaj]] || [[word:thawawamash|thawawamash]] || [[word:thawawama|thawawama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawamath|thawamath]] || [[word:thawamaj|thawamaj]] || [[word:thawamash|thawamash]] || [[word:thawama|thawama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawafmath|thawafmath]] || [[word:thawafmaj|thawafmaj]] || [[word:thawafmash|thawafmash]] || [[word:thawafmaf|thawafmaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thawamatha|thawamatha]] || [[word:thawamaja|thawamaja]] || [[word:thawamasha|thawamasha]] || [[word:thawamaka|thawamaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thawamath|thawamath]] || [[word:thawamaj|thawamaj]] || [[word:thawamash|thawamash]] || [[word:thawama|thawama]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thawamathal|thawamathal]] || [[word:thawamajal|thawamajal]] || [[word:thawamashal|thawamashal]] || [[word:thawamakal|thawamakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thawamathatha|thawamathatha]] || [[word:thawamajaja|thawamajaja]] || [[word:thawamashasha|thawamashasha]] || [[word:thawamaka|thawamaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thawamathan|thawamathan]] || [[word:thawamajan|thawamajan]] || [[word:thawamashan|thawamashan]] || [[word:thawamakan|thawamakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thawamathaoro|thawamathaoro]] || [[word:thawamajaoro|thawamajaoro]] || [[word:thawamashaoro|thawamashaoro]] || [[word:thawamakaoro|thawamakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
